hadiths.ar: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ هَاشِمٍ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ کَانَ یُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَ یَقْرَأُ کِتَابَهُ لَا یَدَعُ قِرَاءَهَ سُورَهِ إِنَّا أَرْسَلْنا نُوحاً إِلی قَوْمِهِ فَأَیُّ عَبْدٍ قَرَأَهَا مُحْتَسِباً صَابِراً فِی فَرِیضَهٍ أَوْ نَافِلَهٍ أَسْکَنَهُ اللَّهُ تَعَالَی مَسَاکِنَ الْأَبْرَارِ وَ أَعْطَاهُ ثَلَاثَ جِنَانٍ مَعَ جَنَّتِهِ کَرَامَهً مِنَ اللَّهِ وَ زَوَّجَهُ مِائَتَیْ حَوْرَاءَ وَ أَرْبَعَهَ آلَافِ ثَیِّبٍ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ.
hadiths.en: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Hashim from his father from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: Whoever has belief and firm conviction on Allah should not miss recitation of “Inna Arsalna Noohan ilaa Qaumeh” (i.e. Surah Nuh) because whoever recites Surah Nuh in his obligatory and recommended prayer, Allah would allow him to stay with the virtuous and approved persons of Allah and would award him three gardens of Paradise with his garden by His special favors. He would marry the reciter to two hundred Hoorul Ein and four thousand other women.

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 230, H. 441
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of reciting Surah Nuh
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٣٠، ح ٤٤١

hadiths.ar: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنْ حَنَانِ بْنِ سَدِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ أَکْثَرَ قِرَاءَهَ قُلْ أُوحِیَ إِلَیَ لَمْ یُصِبْهُ فِی الْحَیَاهِ الدُّنْیَا شَیْ ءٌ مِنْ أَعْیُنِ الْجِنِّ وَ لَا نَفْثِهِمْ وَ لَا سِحْرِهِمْ وَ لَا مِنْ کَیْدِهِمْ وَ کَانَ مَعَ مُحَمَّدٍ ص فَیَقُولُ یَا رَبِّ لَا أُرِیدُ بِهِ بَدَلًا وَ لَا أُرِیدُ أَنْ أَبْغِیَ عَنْهُ حِوَلًا.
hadiths.en: 1. From the previous chain from Hanan b. Sadeer from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: Whoever recites it often would neither be affected by the evil eye of Jinn in his worldly life, nor can there be any effect on him of sorcery, now can any harm occur to him through any kind of machination or Satanic action of the Jinn. Also the reciter of Surah Jinn would be in the company of the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) and his Progeny (a.s.).

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 231, H. 442
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of reciting Surah Jinn
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٣١، ح ٤٤٢

hadiths.ar: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ سَیْفِ بْنِ عَمِیرَهَ عَنْ مَنْصُورِ بْنِ جَابِرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ الْمُزَّمِّلِ فِی الْعِشَاءِ الْآخِرَهِ أَوْ فِی آخِرِ اللَّیْلِ کَانَ لَهُ اللَّیْلُ وَ النَّهَارُ شَاهِدَیْنِ مَعَ سُورَهِ الْمُزَّمِّلِ وَ أَحْیَاهُ اللَّهُ حَیَاهً طَیِّبَهً وَ أَمَاتَهُ مِیتَهً طَیِّبَهً.
hadiths.en: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Sayf b. ’Umayra from Mansur b. Jabir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Muzzammil in Isha prayer or during last part of night, the night and the day will bear witness along with Surah Muzzammil for him and the Almighty Allah will grant him pure life and death.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 232, H. 443
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of reciting Surah Muzzammil
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٣٢، ح ٤٤٣

hadiths.ar: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ عَاصِمٍ الْخَیَّاطِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدٍ الْبَاقِرِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ فِی الْفَرِیضَهِ سُورَهَ الْمُدَّثِّرِ کَانَ حَقّاً عَلَی اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ أَنْ یَجْعَلَهُ مَعَ مُحَمَّدٍ ص فِی دَرَجَتِهِ وَ لَا یُدْرِکُهُ فِی حَیَاهِ الدُّنْیَا شَقَاءٌ أَبَداً إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ.
hadiths.en: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from ’Asim al-Khayyat from Muhammad b. Muslim from Abi Ja’far Muhammad al-Baqir (a.s.) who said: Imam Muhammad Baqir (a.s.), “One who recites Surah Muddassir in his obligatory Salaat it is the duty of Allah to give him a status along with Muhammad (s.a.w.s.) and he will not face any difficulty in his worldly life, God-Willing.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 233, H. 444
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of reciting Surah Muddassir
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٣٣، ح ٤٤٤

hadiths.ar: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْعَلَاءِ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: مَنْ أَدْمَنَ قِرَاءَهَ لا أُقْسِمُ وَ کَانَ یَعْمَلُ بِهَا بَعَثَهُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مَعَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ص مِنْ قَبْرِهِ فِی أَحْسَنِ صُورَهٍ وَ یُبَشِّرُهُ وَ یَضْحَکُ فِی وَجْهِهِ حَتَّی یَجُوزَ عَلَی الصِّرَاطِ وَ الْمِیزَانِ.
hadiths.en: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Basir from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: Whoever recites Surah Qiyamat regularly and acts upon it, Allah would raise him from the grave with the Messenger of Allah (s.a.w.s.) in the best form. He would be given glad-tiding and he would pass through Sirat and Mizan smiling.

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 234, H. 445
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of reciting Surah Qiyamat
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٣٤، ح ٤٤٥

hadiths.ar: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ جُبَیْرٍ الْعَزْرَمِیِّ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ هَلْ أَتی عَلَی الْإِنْسانِ فِی کُلِّ غَدَاهِ خَمِیسٍ زَوَّجَهُ اللَّهُ مِنَ الْحُورِ الْعِینِ ثَمَانَمِائَهِ عَذْرَاءَ وَ أَرْبَعَ آلَافِ ثَیِّبٍ وَ حَوْرَاءَ مِنَ الْحُورِ الْعِینِ وَ کَانَ مَعَ مُحَمَّدٍ ص.
hadiths.en: 1.  Imam  Muhammad  Baqir  (a.s.)  said,  “One  who  recites Surah Insan in the morning of every Thursday Allah would marry   him   to   eight   hundred   virgin   women   and   four thousand  women  who  had  been  married  previously  and give him one more Hoorul Ein and company of Muhammad (s.a.w.s.).”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 235, H. 446
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of reciting Surah Insan
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٣٥، ح ٤٤٦

hadiths.chapter: 236. Reward of reciting Surah Mursalaat, Naba and Nazia’at
hadiths.ar: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو الرُّمَّانِیِّ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ الْمُرْسَلاتِ عُرْفاً عَرَّفَ اللَّهُ بَیْنَهُ وَ بَیْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ ص وَ مَنْ قَرَأَ عَمَّ یَتَساءَلُونَ لَمْ تَخْرُجْ سَنَتُهُ إِذَا کَانَ یُدْمِنُهَا کُلَّ یَوْمٍ حَتَّی یَزُورَ بَیْتَ اللَّهِ الْحَرَامَ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ وَ مَنْ قَرَأَ وَ النَّازِعَاتِ لَمْ یَمُتْ إِلَّا رَیَّاناً وَ لَمْ یَبْعَثْهُ اللَّهُ إِلَّا رَیَّاناً وَ لَمْ یُدْخِلْهُ الْجَنَّهَ إِلَّا رَیَّاناً.
hadiths.en: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. ’Amru al-Rummani from his father from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Whoever recites it, it becomes a way of sincerity and a means of affection between him and Prophet Muhammad (s.a.w.s.). If one recites “Amma Yatasaa-aloon” (Surah Naba) daily for one year a year would not pass but he would have the honor of paying homage to the Holy House of Allah, if Allah wills. One who recites Surah Nazia’at, would not die except as cheerful and hearty, and Allah would not raise him from the grave but in happy and pleasant state, and he would not enter Paradise except as happy and joyful.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 236, H. 447
reference.chapter: Reward of reciting Surah Mursalaat, Naba and Nazia’at
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of reciting Surah Mursalaat, Naba and Nazia’at
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٣٦، ح ٤٤٧

hadiths.chapter: 237. Reward of reciting Surah Abas and Takwir
hadiths.ar: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ مُعَاوِیَهَ بْنِ وَهْبٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ عَبَسَ وَ تَوَلَّی وَ إِذَا الشَّمْسُ کُوِّرَتْ کَانَ تَحْتَ جَنَاحِ اللَّهِ مِنَ الْجِنَانِ وَ فِی ظِلِّ اللَّهِ وَ کَرَامَتِهِ فِی جِنَانِهِ وَ لَا یَعْظُمُ ذَلِکَ عَلَی اللَّهِ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ.
hadiths.en: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Muawiyah b. Wahab from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Abas and Takrim would remain under the shade of Allah and would remain safe from usurping others’ property. He would receive favor of Allah and go to Paradise. And it is not a big thing for Almighty Allah.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 237, H. 448
reference.chapter: Reward of reciting Surah Abas and Takwir
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of reciting Surah Abas and Takwir
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٣٧، ح ٤٤٨

hadiths.chapter: 238. Reward of reciting Surah Infitar and Surah Inshiqaq
hadiths.ar: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْعَلَاءِ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع یَقُولُ مَنْ قَرَأَ هَاتَیْنِ السُّورَتَیْنِ وَ جَعَلَهُمَا نُصْبَ عَیْنِهِ فِی صَلَاهِ الْفَرِیضَهِ وَ النَّافِلَهِ لَمْ یَحْجُبْهُ اللَّهُ مِنْ حَاجَهٍ وَ لَمْ یَحْجُزْهُ مِنَ اللَّهِ حَاجِزٌ وَ لَمْ یَزَلْ یَنْظُرُ إِلَیْهِ حَتَّی یَفْرُغَ مِنْ حِسَابِ النَّاسِ.
hadiths.en: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.), “One who recites Surah Infitar and  Surah  Inshiqaq  in  his  obligatory  and  recommended prayer, Allah will eliminate all the barriers to the fulfillment of  his desires. There would be nothing to stop him. Allah will look at him with mercy till accounting of deeds of all the people is done.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 238, H. 449
reference.chapter: Reward of reciting Surah Infitar and Surah Inshiqaq
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of reciting Surah Infitar and Surah Inshiqaq
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٣٨، ح ٤٤٩

hadiths.ar: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ الْجَمَّالِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ فِی الْفَرِیضَهِ وَیْلٌ لِلْمُطَفِّفِینَ أَعْطَاهُ اللَّهُ الْأَمْنَ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ مِنَ النَّارِ وَ لَمْ تَرَهُ وَ لَا یَرَاهَا وَ لَمْ یَمُرَّ عَلَی جِسْرِ جَهَنَّمَ وَ لَا یُحَاسَبُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ.
hadiths.en: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Safwan al-Jamal from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: Whoever recites Surah Mutaffifeen in his obligatory prayers, Allah would keep him safe from the fire of Hell on the Day of Judgment, neither would the fire of Hell see him nor will he see the fire of Hell, and the reciter of Surah Mutaffifeen would not have to pass over the bridge of Hell, not would face any questioning on the Day of Judgment.

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 239, H. 450
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of reciting Surah Mutaffifeen
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٣٩، ح ٤٥٠

hadiths.ar: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ الْمُقْرِی عَنْ یُونُسَ بْنِ ظَبْیَانَ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ وَ السَّماءِ ذاتِ الْبُرُوجِ فِی فَرَائِضِهِ فَإِنَّهَا سُورَهُ النَّبِیِّینَ کَانَ مَحْشَرُهُ وَ مَوْقِفُهُ مَعَ النَّبِیِّینَ وَ الْمُرْسَلِینَ وَ الصَّالِحِینَ.
hadiths.en: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Ahmad al-Muqri from Yunis b. Dhabyan from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Buruj in his obligatory prayers, by virtue of the dignity of this Surah, he would be raised among the prophets because this Surah is related to them.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 240, H. 451
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of reciting Surah Buruj
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٤٠، ح ٤٥١

hadiths.ar: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنِ الْمُعَلَّی بْنِ خُنَیْسٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ کَانَتْ قِرَاءَتُهُ فِی فَرَائِضِهِ بِ السَّماءِ وَ الطَّارِقِ کَانَتْ لَهُ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ جَاهٌ وَ مَنْزِلَهٌ وَ کَانَ مِنْ رُفَقَاءِ النَّبِیِّینَ وَ أَصْحَابِهِمْ فِی الْجَنَّهِ.
hadiths.en: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hussain from his father from al-Mu’ala b. Khunays from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: Whoever recites Surah Tariq in his obligatory prayer would enjoy great prestige and position before Allah on the Day of Judgment and he would be among the friends of the prophets and their companions in Paradise.

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 241, H. 452
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of reciting Surah Tariq
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٤١، ح ٤٥٢

hadiths.ar: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سَبِّحِ اسْمَ رَبِّکَ الْأَعْلَی فِی فَرِیضَهٍ أَوْ نَافِلَهٍ قِیلَ لَهُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ ادْخُلِ الْجَنَّهَ مِنْ أَیِّ أَبْوَابِ الْجَنَّهِ شِئْتَ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ.
hadiths.en: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hussain from his father from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: Whoever recites it in his obligatory and recommended prayers, it would be said to him on the Day of Judgment: Enter Paradise from whichever door you like.

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 242, H. 453
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of reciting Surah A’laa
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٤٢، ح ٤٥٣

hadiths.ar: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ أَبِی الْمِعْزَی عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ أَدْمَنَ قِرَاءَهَ هَلْ أَتاکَ حَدِیثُ الْغاشِیَهِ فِی فَرِیضَهٍ أَوْ نَافِلَهٍ غَشَّاهُ اللَّهُ بِرَحْمَتِهِ فِی الدُّنْیَا وَ الْآخِرَهِ وَ آتَاهُ اللَّهُ الْأَمْنَ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ مِنْ عَذَابِ النَّارِ.
hadiths.en: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Abi al-Mi’za from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: One who regularly recites: Surah Ghashiya in his obligatory and recommended prayers, Allah’s mercy would pervade him in this world as well as the next, and on the Day of Judgment, Allah would keep that man safe and protected from the chastisement of fire.

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 243, H. 454
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of reciting Surah Ghashiya
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٤٣، ح ٤٥٤

hadiths.ar: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ صَنْدَلٍ عَنْ دَاوُدَ بْنِ فَرْقَدٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: اقْرَءُوا سُورَهَ الْفَجْرِ فِی فَرَائِضِکُمْ وَ نَوَافِلِکُمْ فَإِنَّهَا سُورَهٌ لِلْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ ع مَنْ قَرَأَهَا کَانَ مَعَ الْحُسَیْنِ ع یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ فِی دَرَجَتِهِ مِنَ الْجَنَّهِ- إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزِیزٌ حَکِیمٌ
hadiths.en: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Sandal from Dawud b. Farqad from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Recite Surah Fajr in your obligatory and recommended prayers. This Surah is related to Imam Husain bin Ali (a.s.). Hence the reciter of this Surah will get a position near Imam Husain (a.s.) in Paradise on the Day of Judgment. Surely Allah is Honored and Wise.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 244, H. 455
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of reciting Surah Fajr
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٤٤، ح ٤٥٥

hadiths.ar: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ وَ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْعَلَاءِ عَنْ أَبِی الْعَلَاءِ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ کَانَ قِرَاءَتُهُ فِی فَرِیضَهٍ لا أُقْسِمُ بِهذَا الْبَلَدِ کَانَ فِی الدُّنْیَا مَعْرُوفاً أَنَّهُ مِنَ الصَّالِحِینَ وَ کَانَ فِی الْآخِرَهِ مَعْرُوفاً أَنَّ لَهُ مِنَ اللَّهِ مَکَاناً وَ کَانَ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ مِنْ رُفَقَاءِ النَّبِیِّینَ وَ الشُّهَداءِ وَ الصَّالِحِینَ
hadiths.en: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from his father and al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi al-’Ala from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Balad in his obligatory prayers will be a virtuous man in this world. He would be known on the Day of Judgment as a person of high rank near Allah. He would be a friend of prophets, martyrs and virtuous on the Day of Judgment.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 245, H. 456
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of reciting Surah Balad
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٤٥، ح ٤٥٦

hadiths.chapter: 246. Reward of reciting Surah Shams, Lail, Zuha and Alam Nashrah
hadiths.ar: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ مُعَاوِیَهَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ أَکْثَرَ قِرَاءَهَ وَ الشَّمْسِ وَ وَ اللَّیْلِ إِذا یَغْشی وَ وَ الضُّحی وَ أَ لَمْ نَشْرَحْ فِی یَوْمٍ أَوْ لَیْلَهٍ لَمْ یَبْقَ شَیْ ءٌ بِحَضْرَتِهِ إِلَّا شَهِدَ لَهُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ حَتَّی شَعْرُهُ وَ بَشَرُهُ وَ لَحْمُهُ وَ دَمُهُ وَ عُرُوقُهُ وَ عَصَبُهُ وَ عِظَامُهُ وَ جَمِیعُ مَا أَقَلَّتِ الْأَرْضُ مِنْهُ وَ یَقُولُ الرَّبُّ تَبَارَکَ وَ تَعَالَی قَبِلْتُ شَهَادَتَکُمْ لِعَبْدِی وَ أَجَزْتُهَا لَهُ انْطَلِقُوا بِهِ إِلَی جِنَانِی حَتَّی یَتَخَیَّرَ مِنْهَا حَیْثُ مَا أَحَبَّ فَأَعْطُوهُ إِیَّاهَا مِنْ غَیْرِ مَنٍّ وَ لَکِنْ رَحْمَهً مِنِّی وَ فَضْلًا عَلَیْهِ وَ هَنِیئاً لِعَبْدِی.
hadiths.en: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Muawiyah b. Ammar from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: Whoever recites Surah Shams, Surah Lail, Surah Zuha and Surah Alam Nashrah in one day or night, nothing would remain that would not stand witness for his recitation on the Day of Judgment, so much so that the reciter’s hair, face, blood, muscles and even bones would stand witness for him, and everything that grows from the earth would stand witness along with them and Allah would say: I have accepted the evidence of all of you for My servant, now admit him into Paradise and give him all that he likes on My behalf. Along with this also give him more by virtue of My mercy and favor.

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 246, H. 457
reference.chapter: Reward of reciting Surah Shams, Lail, Zuha and Alam Nashrah
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of reciting Surah Shams, Lail, Zuha and Alam Nashrah
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٤٦، ح ٤٥٧

hadiths.ar: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ شُعَیْبٍ الْعَقَرْقُوفِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ وَ التِّینِ فِی فَرَائِضِهِ وَ نَوَافِلِهِ أُعْطِیَ مِنَ الْجَنَّهِ حَیْثُ یَرْضَی إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ.
hadiths.en: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Shu’aib al-’Aqraqufi from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: Whoever recites Surah Teen in his obligatory and recommended prayers would be given a place in Paradise of his liking, if Allah wills.

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 247, H. 458
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of reciting Surah Teen
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٤٧، ح ٤٥٨

hadiths.ar: وَ بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ مُسْکَانَ عَنْ سُلَیْمَانَ بْنِ خَالِدٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ فِی یَوْمِهِ أَوْ لَیْلَتِهِ اقْرَأْ بِاسْمِ رَبِّکَ ثُمَّ مَاتَ فِی یَوْمِهِ أَوْ لَیْلَتِهِ مَاتَ شَهِیداً وَ بَعَثَهُ اللَّهُ شَهِیداً وَ أَحْیَاهُ شَهِیداً وَ کَانَ کَمَنْ ضَرَبَ بِسَیْفِهِ فِی سَبِیلِ اللَّهِ مَعَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ص.
hadiths.en: 1. And from the previous chain from al-Hassan from Ali b. Muskan from Sulayman b. Khalid from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: If someone recites Surah Alaq in the day or night and then he dies the same day or night it is as though he achieved the rank of martyrdom and he would remain alive like a martyr who might have used his sword along with the Messenger of Allah (s.a.w.s.).

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 248, H. 459
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of reciting Surah Alaq
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٤٨، ح ٤٥٩

hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ سَیْفِ بْنِ عَمِیرَهَ عَنْ رَجُلٍ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ إِنَّا أَنْزَلْناهُ فِی لَیْلَهِ الْقَدْرِ مُجْهِراً بِهَا صَوْتَهُ کَانَ کَالشَّاهِرِ سَیْفَهُ فِی سَبِیلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ مَنْ قَرَأَهَا سِرّاً کَانَ کَمُتَشَحِّطٍ بِدَمِهِ فِی سَبِیلِ اللَّهِ وَ مَنْ قَرَأَهَا عَشْرَ مَرَّاتٍ مَحَا اللَّهُ عَنْهُ أَلْفَ ذَنْبٍ مِنْ ذُنُوبِهِ.
hadiths.en: 1. Abi (rah) from Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Muhammad from al-Hassan b. Mahbub from Sayf b. ’Umayra from a man from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Qadr loudly is like a person who raises sword in the way of Allah and one who recites Surah Qadr in low voice is like a person who is smeared in blood fighting in the way of Allah. One who recites it ten times, Allah will forgive one thousand sins committed by him.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 249, H. 460
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of reciting Surah Qadr
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٤٩، ح ٤٦٠
